# Whitelist for public snapshot publish
# ------------------------------------
# Rules:
# - Paths are relative to source repo root.
# - Empty lines and comments are ignored.
# - Trailing slash is optional.
# - Use allowlist-only thinking: include only what must be public.

# Core metadata
.gitignore
README.md
LICENSE.md
requirements.txt
requirements-gpu.txt
pyproject.toml
pytest.ini

# Runtime / library code (adjust as needed)
capitalmarket
capitalselector

notebooks/team_demo.ipynb

# Public release process scripts
scripts/publish_release.sh
scripts/publish_whitelist.txt
